LanguageData.ARA_InteractiveEggSac_Start.label: First-born Arachneia oocysts
LanguageData.ARA_InteractiveEggSac_Start.description: A fragile, flammable, slimy sac is the egg laid by the Queen Arachne species when it first arrived here. It contains the nutrients and genetic material needed to nurture a new insect, and the activation process can be completed through the interaction of the Queen Arachne species. \n\nPrimary egg sacs can withstand extreme weather and hatch extremely quickly, but they can only support the hatching of a few types of Zerg.
LanguageData.ARA_InteractiveEggSac_Queen.label: Empress Arachne egg sac
LanguageData.ARA_InteractiveEggSac_Queen.description: The super giant egg sac used to hatch Queen Arachne's species has a skin as hard as a fortress, and the genetic material and nutrients contained inside are enough to hatch a behemoth that is unheard of on this planet.
